title: VideoListResponse
description: A list of video resources matching the request criteria.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#videoListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token that can be used as the pageToken parameter to retrieve the next page of results in the result set.

prevPageToken.description: The token that can be used as the pageToken parameter to retrieve the previous page of results in the result set.

items.description: A list of videos that match the request criteria.
